tokens.description: Full SDXL token string for this character's visual identity

negative_tokens.description: Tokens added to negative prompt when this character appears

shorthand.description: Short human-readable label used in logs and debug output (e.g., 'blue-shirt man')

count_notes.description: Notes on SDXL count reliability for this character (e.g., plurals are unreliable for exact counts above 3)
